title: Local Setup and First Run with Josh Crites | NoirCon 3 Devconnect 2025
description:
In this talk, Josh Crites, Developer Relations Engineer at Aztec, walks through how to set up your development environment for building on Aztec.

A quick, practical guide to getting up and running with the Aztec stack so you can start building with programmable privacy.
